title: Youtube Poop:  The King Goes on Vacation and Leaves Link in Charge
description:
Ironically, I leave for vacation tomorrow.... no I'm not going to Disney.

The party music is from the Samba scene in The Mask.  I do not own it.  Which means this video should NOT be muted...... are you listening Youtube?
Video sources:
Faces of Evil
Wand of Gamelon
Hotel Mario
Audio sources:
Car sound effect found somewhere on youtube
Psycho music
Price is Right theme 
Samba scene from the mask
